guidance: Teach a repeatable framework or mental model a service-business owner can apply this week. Name the steps concretely. Premium and confident, never generic.
evidence_note: Grounded in Black Arrow's method and general operating logic; no invented stats.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Authority / Frameworks' was the most under-served eligible category (target 25%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Carousels are the current save/share leader for educational, numbered-step content, and Authority/Frameworks was the most under-served category this cycle; this turns Black Arrow's four-system method into a self-scoring mental model the owner can run this week, not just a restated stat.

guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Education / Informative' was the most under-served eligible category (target 20%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Reels remain the reach engine for cold audiences in 2026, and this fills a gap the account hasn't covered: the voicemail greeting itself as the redirect mechanism, a zero-cost fix distinct from the text-back script and missed-call-math angles already shipped.
